content.question: What is the net segregation effect of school consolidation in rural Hungary—does it reduce between-school segregation (by eliminating isolated single-class schools) or increase it (by triggering non-Roma family migration to alternative schooling)?
content.reduction_path: Conduct a quasi-experimental analysis of municipalities that have undergone school consolidation since 2013, measuring within-school vs. between-school segregation indices before and after consolidation, and cross-referencing enrollment changes in church-run and private schools in the same region during the consolidation window.
